launches.name: Ask Product Hunt AI
launches.tagline: Find the right product, just ask
launches.description: Product Hunt is home to countless products and the people who love them. We built Ask to help you make sense of it all. It's an AI assistant that answers your product questions using Product Hunt data, whether you're picking a new tool, comparing alternatives, or seeing what's trending.

launches.name: Beezi AI
launches.tagline: Make AI development structured, secure, and cost-efficient.
launches.description: Beezi AI is a platform for orchestration of AI-driven software development. It helps teams structure tickets for better prompts, route tasks to the right models, and track AI usage and costs in real time. With the Analytics Hub, Smart Ticket System, and Model Routing Optimizer, teams reduce rework, control AI spend, and scale development with predictable, measurable outcomes. Beezi supports secure on-prem or private cloud deployment with full control over data and models.

launches.name: DeepSeek-V4
launches.tagline: The open-source era of 1M context intelligence
launches.description: DeepSeek-V4 Preview is a new series of highly efficient MoE language models, featuring V4-Pro (1.6T params) and V4-Flash (284B params). Both models support a 1 million token context window by default, utilizing a novel hybrid attention architecture to drastically reduce compute and memory costs.

launches.name: Codex 3.0 by OpenAI
launches.tagline: Codex can now build, test & debug on autopilot
launches.description: With GPT-5.5, Codex evolves into a true cross-app coding agent—navigating browsers, interacting with web apps, generating docs in Microsoft Office and Google Drive, and testing workflows like a real user. It sees, clicks, debugs, and iterates autonomously, bringing developers closer to reliable, end-to-end automated builds.

launches.name: Spira AI
launches.tagline: AI Influencer that always on trend, create & grow your brand
launches.description: Built by the teams behind Creatify AI, TikTok, CapCut, Meta, Snap and Midjourney — Spira gives you autonomous AI Influencers that run your social media end-to-end 24/7. They catch trends before they peak, create content in your voice, and publish across TikTok, Instagram, X and more. You stay in control through your preferred chat app — or let them run completely on their own. 10M+ impressions before public launch. Your first AI Influencer is less than 10 minutes away.

launches.name: BAND
launches.tagline: Coordinate and govern multi-agent work in a single chat
launches.description: BAND helps teams enable and govern interaction across distributed AI agents and human teams. Through a shared interaction layer, it supports real-time multi-peer collaboration with built-in governance, giving organizations a structured way to manage how agents communicate and coordinate. Unlike orchestration tools or agent frameworks, BAND governs the interaction layer itself, reducing fragmentation and making collaboration reliable at scale.

launches.name: Mozart Studio 1.0
launches.tagline: A Generative Audio Workstation with VSTs
launches.description: An AI music creation studio that connects to all your VSTs — right in your browser. Mozart can now use tools — your plugins, your sounds. Start with a hum, build layer by layer with instruments or AI, and go from inspiration to a professional-sounding finished song.

launches.name: Google Workspace Intelligence
launches.tagline: AI that understands and powers your Workspace
launches.description: Workspace Intelligence bridges the gap between your Workspace apps, your active projects, your collaborators, and your organization’s domain knowledge.

launches.name: Bansi AI by Writesonic
launches.tagline: AI video editor for long-form talking head videos
launches.description: AI video editor that applies expert techniques automatically. Punch zooms, smart B-roll, kinetic text, sound design—upload raw footage, download professional videos.

launches.name: Onboarding0
launches.tagline: Turn company knowledge into AI-guided onboarding
launches.description: Onboarding0 turns your scattered company knowledge into a structured AI onboarding system. Connect your docs, map your org, and an AI agent guides every new hire to productivity. Built for humans today — the knowledge backbone for AI agents tomorrow.

launches.name: Nordcraft 2.0
launches.tagline: I design agent with full HTML/CSS control and SSR
launches.description: Nordcraft 2.0 adds a powerful AI Agent to the visual website builder. Up to 6x faster than Claude Code and Lovable and with a visual interface that lets you ship with absolute confidence.

launches.name: NotchNest AI
launches.tagline: AI powered by Apple Intelligence now in your Notch
launches.description: NotchNest AI turns your MacBook's notch into a smart productivity hub, powered by on-device Apple Intelligence. Daily Brief AI summarizes your calendar. AI Clipboard Manager saves, rephrases, and summarizes everything you copy. AI Quick Notes captures and refines your ideas instantly. Plus music control, file tray, bookmarks, Pomodoro timer, AirDrop, camera mirror, and more. No cloud. No subscriptions. Your data never leaves your Mac.

launches.name: LifeOS
launches.tagline: Turn your AI chats/memory to intros with real humans
launches.description: 🧠 Claude & ChatGPT know you better than you know yourself. Nobody's using that. Until now. Every 2am vent. Every idea you've never said out loud. That's the most honest map of you that exists. 🗺️ LifeOS reads your private AI memory → finds the one human who changes your life. 🔗 👤 One prompt. Co-founder, life partner, 3am friend — you name it. 🎯 We make the intro.

launches.name: Yutori Delegate
launches.tagline: Why cowork when you can delegate?
launches.description: Delegate is an eager AI agent that understands your context, never sleeps, never forgets anything, and loves busywork — research, coordination, monitoring, communication, admin, etc. Always-on, always yours. Throw tasks at it and move on. Come back to threads closed, research compiled, replies sent, follow-ups tracked.

launches.name: Emotional intelligence AI for live calls
launches.tagline: Emotional intelligence AI for live sales calls
launches.description: Amotions AI builds emotionally intelligent AI agents that provide live in-call and post-call guidance, and pre-call prep and roleplay to boost win rates and cut ramp time, starting with sales and expanding to other use cases. We are building the emotional intelligence infrastructure that turns every conversation into a success. Provides real-time coaching during live conversations, reinforcement of your sales process, objection handling and discovery guidance, show technical answers live.

launches.name: Universal Gas Framework (UGF)
launches.tagline: Route Actions, Not Liquidity
launches.description: UGF introduces Remote Transactions, where source-chain value becomes destination-chain action. Built for AI agents, dApps, wallets, and cross-chain apps, it avoids bridging liquidity, destination-chain prefunding, and ERC-4337/paymaster complexity through a signer-authenticated Value-to-Action API.

launches.name: Nyx
launches.tagline: Your own team of AI security engineers, on demand.
launches.description: AI agents fail in ways traditional software doesn't. Nyx is your own team of AI security engineers, on demand, that helps you find all the ways in which your AI agents fail. Point it at any AI agent, or multi-agent system, and it launches 1,000+ attack strategies that adapt to your system in real time - pure blackbox, no integration needed. Built by ex-Meta and Monzo engineers.

launches.name: GPT Image 2
launches.tagline: Create and edit images with prompt precision
launches.description: Generate and edit images with GPT Image 2 using natural-language prompts, accurate text rendering, and reference-image control for marketing, product, and design work.

launches.name: Memory Sync
launches.tagline: Take your AI memory with you across Claude, Gemini, and more
launches.description: Memory Sync helps you take your AI memory with you. If you use multiple AI assistants, you’ve probably had to repeat the same preferences, context, and instructions again and again. Memory Sync gives you one portable Memory.md so you can pull memory from one platform, edit it in one place, and push it into another. It currently supports ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, Kimi, Mistral, and Copilot, and also tracks last sync times so you can see what’s up to date.

launches.name: GPT Breeze
launches.tagline: Save hours consuming long content on the web
launches.description: GPT Breeze Extension summarizes YouTube videos and articles, accelerates your writing, by saving your prompts as one-click shortcuts.

launches.name: MetaVeils
launches.tagline: Sanitize documents before pasting into AI chatbots
launches.description: Every time you paste a document into ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini, you're sending more than you think. Client names. Addresses. Credit cards. SSNs. GPS coordinates hidden in photos. Author metadata buried in PDFs. 🔍 AI-POWERED PII DETECTION 🤖 IMAGE OCR SCANNING 🛡️ METADATA STRIPPING Redact sensitive data before sharing with ChatGPT, Claude, or Gemini. —100% offline on your Mac.

launches.name: DocVerify
launches.tagline: Catch fake documents before your system trusts them
launches.description: DocVerify is an AI-powered API that detects forged, manipulated, and AI-generated documents in seconds. Upload a receipt, bank statement, ID, or any PDF — our Sentinel-4B model checks for pixel-level tampering, metadata inconsistencies, and GenAI artifacts. Built for developers and AI agents: one API call returns a trust score with detailed forensic evidence. Free tier available, no credit card required. Stop trusting documents blindly.

launches.name: AI Business Coach
launches.tagline: An AI business coach built for founders
launches.description: AI Business Coach helps founders and business owners understand and improve their business through structured AI-driven assessments. Explore core pillars like sales, marketing, operations, and finance, then get clear summaries, practical insights, and guidance tailored to your business.

launches.name: TUICommander
launches.tagline: AI-native IDE for multi-agent development
launches.description: Run parallel AI coding agents on isolated branches with full observability. Diffs, PRs, CI status, usage dashboards, one workspace, zero context loss. Auto-detects 11 agents (Claude Code, Codex, Aider, Gemini CLI, Amp, and more) with rate limit countdowns and question detection. Git worktree isolation per branch. MCP Proxy Hub. CI Auto-Heal. Built-in AI Chat (Ollama, Anthropic, OpenAI). Mobile PWA companion. Rust + SolidJS. ~80MB RAM. macOS, Linux, Windows. Apache 2.0.

launches.name: GPT-5.5 by OpenAI
launches.tagline: OpenAI's smartest and most intuitive to use model yet
launches.description: GPT-5.5 is OpenAI’s most advanced model yet, designed to handle real-world work with greater autonomy, speed, and efficiency. It excels at coding, research, data analysis, and task execution — planning, using tools, and iterating with minimal guidance — making it a powerful partner for complex, multi-step workflows.

launches.name: Claude Connectors
launches.tagline: New connectors in Claude for everyday life
launches.description: Claude now connects with 200+ apps like Spotify, Instacart, Uber, and TripAdvisor, letting you book, order, and plan without leaving a single conversation. Designed for both work and daily life, it brings travel, food, and entertainment together intelligently suggesting and executing tasks in real time.

launches.name: Skill Control Plane
launches.tagline: Governance for AI agent skills — MCP-native
launches.description: AI agents run on "skills" — code plugins that are the new npm. Skill Control Plane is the first governance layer: import from any source, scan for risks (3 automated layers + AI deep scan), approve, distribute via MCP. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf.

launches.name: Zelyx
launches.tagline: AI COO that helps you with taking care of your operations.
launches.description: Most tools alert you. Zelyx closes the loop. It reads across Slack, Jira, HubSpot, Gmail and 14 other tools and detects three things no single tool can: commitments made in conversations that nobody followed through on, silence that's blocking an outcome, and work that has no owner. Then it lets you act on it without leaving Zelyx. Not a dashboard. Not a notification tool. An operational layer that actually closes things.

launches.name: HireAI
launches.tagline: Hire AI employees that work 24/7, right inside WhatsApp
launches.description: The AI era gave us "AI for hiring." HireAI is the first platform for hiring AI. Not a chatbot. An actual AI employee — with a name, a role, and a job to do. ChatGPT tells you how to analyse competitors. Your HireAI employee researches live, builds the report, and delivers it to your WhatsApp or your client's inbox — in minutes. Current roles: Personal Assistant & Team Assistant. L2–L4 coming: Data Analyst, Research Analyst, Operations Manager. Hire in Minutes. Fire in Seconds.

launches.name: Fleet Sync Pro
launches.tagline: AI-ready fleet SaaS by Ortem Technologies — deploy in days
launches.description: Fleet Sync Pro is a production-ready fleet management SaaS by Ortem Technologies LLC a Leading AI-powered dev agency building custom SaaS with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini & more. Looking to build a similar fleet app? Ortem deploys white-labeled versions in days. ✅ Real-time dashboard & work orders ✅ Fuel analytics & maintenance reminders ✅ Multi-tenant + 5-Role RBAC ✅ AI-ready architecture ✅ Mobile-ready & white-label From $79/mo · 30-day free trial ortemtech.com

launches.name: PlayLog - Automated bug reports
launches.tagline: Captures screen recording, console logs, network requests
launches.description: Automated bug reports developers can always reproduce. Automatically captures screen recording, console logs, network requests, and every user action. Share a link — developers see everything they need. AI summary Structured markdown summary ready to paste into any AI agent PlayLog generates a structured bug summary in markdown format from the session data. Copy it and paste directly into Claude, ChatGPT, or any AI agent to start debugging immediately.

launches.name: Your Name in Landsat 🛰️
launches.tagline: The planet can spell your name – literally!
launches.description: Type your name and see it spelled out in stunning Landsat satellite imagery. Explore Earth from space, letter by letter, with NASA and USGS Landsat images.

launches.name: TraceUI
launches.tagline: Turn any website into on-brand Ads
launches.description: TraceUI reads any website URL and instantly generates on-brand marketing ads. It extracts your colors, fonts, and logo automatically. Try for free today!

launches.name: Haiker
launches.tagline: Hacker News App for non-native english speaker
launches.description: A Hacker News client, designed for non-English speakers, with auto-translation.

launches.name: MailCue
launches.tagline: Run as a fully hardened production email server.
launches.description: MailCue is an all-in-one email testing server packaged in a single Docker container. Unlike simple catch-all SMTPs, it provides a fully-featured mail stack with Postfix, Dovecot, SpamAssassin, DKIM/DMARC verification, and a modern React UI. Test your email workflows exactly as they behave in production with IMAP/POP3 access, API injection, real-time events, and GPG encryption. Perfect for local development, CI/CD pipelines, and ensuring your transactional emails actually deliver.

launches.name: boots.list
launches.tagline: From Rekordbox collection to set-ready playlist
launches.description: Planning a DJ set in Rekordbox means hours of manually sorting tracks into an order that actually flows. boots.list fixes that. boots.list turns your Rekordbox XML export into a set-ready playlist. Filter by genre, dial in duration + BPM range, and get tracks ordered along a natural energy arc — intro, build, peak, resolve. Plus there's a built-in scanner that fills in missing BPM or Camelot key data by analysing audio locally on your Mac. No cloud. No telemetry. Cue points and loops intact.

launches.name: TuneJourney.com
launches.tagline: AI learns your listening habits and curates your live radio
launches.description: TuneJourney is a free, browser-based radio platform powered by AI. While you listen, AI listens with you in real time—detecting music, talk, and ads, learning your taste, and building smart station profiles. It can also auto-skip chatter and ads in live radio so the music keeps flowing. Explore 70,000+ live stations (tunes) across 11,000+ cities (journeys) on an interactive 3D globe. No signup required. Mobile apps coming soon.

launches.name: SaveForm.io
launches.tagline: Automated form tracking and e-mail notifications & webhooks
launches.description: SaveForm removes the need for backend form handling with no server and no setup required. Unlike traditional solutions, it is plug and play with instant submissions to your dashboard. Built in automated emails, real time notifications, and webhook integrations like n8n, Zapier, and Discord come standard. A generous free tier of 100 submissions per month makes it ideal for simple sites without complexity.

launches.name: Tyndale
launches.tagline: Translate your app with the AI you already pay for
launches.description: i18n for React, Next.js, and Astro that runs on the AI subscription you already have. Content-hashed deltas mean only changed strings are retranslated, so unchanged UI and docs cost zero tokens.

launches.name: mostly
launches.tagline: A habit tracker that doesn't punish you for resting
launches.description: A habit tracker that swaps streaks for weekly targets. Pick a goal like 4 out of 7 days, and just hit it most weeks. Take a day off, you're not starting over. Monday resets everything. No streak counters. No guilt mechanics. Rest days are part of the design. Research (Lally, 2010) found occasional rest days don't hurt habit formation. Consistency over months beats daily perfection. Free with 3 habits. Pay once for unlimited + iCloud sync.

launches.name: Smart PDF Tools
launches.tagline: Free online PDF tools — no signup needed
launches.description: Merge, split, compress, convert, and explain PDF files — 100% free, no signup required. Works entirely in your browser. No file size limits, no watermarks, no accounts. Built for people who just need it done fast.

launches.name: Simple AI Notepad
launches.tagline: A lightweight, blazing-fast, and cost-efficient AI editor.
launches.description: To minimize switching between tools, I built a lightweight editor with fast, low-cost AI. It lets you instantly use AI voice transcription with a single shortcut no matter which window you have open, create and refine notes based on your instructions, and even format regular notes into Markdown with AI before printing them in preview, all in one smooth workflow.

launches.name: Gmail Button Inserter
launches.tagline: Turn emails into action with one-click buttons
launches.description: Most tools make you sign up and pay for basic stuff this one doesn’t. Just install and use. It’s intentionally simple, built for real everyday needs, and open to feature requests if you want more.

launches.name: Shipfolio
launches.tagline: A minimal tracker for indie devs. iPhone, web app, Watch
launches.description: A minimal project tracker for indie devs. Capture ideas, track progress, and ship with momentum. iOS, web, and Apple Watch, all synced.

launches.name: Spendlens
launches.tagline: Privacy first. Your finance. Your data. Your money in focus.
launches.description: Zero-knowledge sharing (Aperture): Share your financial data with a partner or advisor through E2E encryption (P256 ECDH + AES-256-GCM). Our servers store only ciphertext. We literally cannot read your shared data. Forecaster: See where your budget will land at end-of-month with confidence intervals and fan charts. The model picks ARIMA or Holt-Winters automatically based on your spending patterns. Truly global: 17 languages. 50 currencies with live conversion rates. Multi-currency accounts.

launches.name: Home Construction Cost Calculator
launches.tagline: Estimate home construction cost instantly
launches.description: Home Construction Cost Calculator helps you estimate the total cost of building your house based on area, location, and construction quality. Get a detailed and accurate budget instantly. 🔹 Estimate construction cost quickly 🔹 Supports multiple regions (India, USA, UK) 🔹 Adjust area, floors, and quality 🔹 Includes location and contingency factors 🔹 Simple, fast, and 100% free Perfect for homeowners, builders, and real estate planners.

launches.name: KubeStellar Console
launches.tagline: Finally see why your workloads fail across clusters
launches.description: Open-source dashboard for understanding and debugging multi-cluster Kubernetes. KubeStellar Console lets you see where workloads propagate, why they fail, and how clusters differ—without digging through kubectl and YAML. Includes workload tracking, cluster insights, GPU visibility, and AI-assisted troubleshooting to reduce debugging time.

launches.name: AppCherish
launches.tagline: Your App Store data, finally telling you what matters
launches.description: Monitor your App Store apps with AppCherish. Get daily insights, crash alerts, and app performance metrics delivered to your inbox. App Store Connect is fine as a raw data source, but answering simple questions (is my app growing? did that update help? which app deserves more focus?) requires too much manual work. AppCherish fixes that. AppCherish gives indie developers, small teams, and agencies a clear picture of their App Store performance — without the noise.

launches.name: Suzanne 3D
launches.tagline: Fastest way to go from idea to physical object
launches.description: Suzanne is an AI-native 3D studio where ideas become printable models in seconds. Generate 3D from text, photos, or voice, then refine in a browser editor. Export STL, GLB, OBJ, GLTF.

launches.name: Micro Steps: Tiny Habits
launches.tagline: Build habits with tiny steps
launches.description: Stop overthinking. Start small. Micro Steps helps you build lasting habits by breaking them into tiny, doable actions — no guilt, no overwhelm. Track your streaks, celebrate wins, and watch your progress grow with a clean, calming design. Tiny Habits is a simple and effective app to help you improve your life with small, sustainable habits.

launches.name: Right Ad
launches.tagline: Know if your ad will stop the scroll before you run it.
launches.description: Right Ad shows whether your paid creative will actually stop the scroll before you spend a dollar. Paste your headline, body, creative concept, audience, and platforms like Meta, Google, LinkedIn, TikTok, X, YouTube, or Reddit. Hundreds of simulated buyers see your ad in context and react. You get predicted CTR/ROAS by platform, why people scroll, click, or convert, and a stronger winning variant to launch with.

launches.name: NearMirror
launches.tagline: Mirror & control Android on desktop with live logs
launches.description: NearMirror lets you mirror and control your Android device from macOS, Windows, and Linux over USB or Wi-Fi. It combines real-time screen mirroring with keyboard/mouse control and live logcat logs—so you can test, debug, and interact without switching devices. Includes audio, recording, file transfer, and camera access. Built for developers, QA, and product teams who want a faster mobile workflow and demo.

launches.name: ProofChain AI
launches.tagline: Prove and verify AI-generated assets instantly
launches.description: ProofChain AI helps companies verify AI-generated contracts, reports, code, media, and digital assets through blockchain-backed proof records. Generate immutable timestamps, issue trust certificates, and create verifiable ownership records for the AI era. Built for founders, enterprises, agencies, and legal teams who need trust at scale.

launches.name: Domioo
launches.tagline: Tinder but for roommates
launches.description: Domioo is Europe's verified property platform. Find real, scam-free rental and sale listings across 7 EU countries. No agency fees, no fake listings — direct from verified owners. Built-in CRM, viewings calendar, and roommate matching.

launches.name: CourseOS
launches.tagline: Turn content into sellable courses with AI
launches.description: Turn your existing content into a sellable course in minutes. CourseOS uses AI to generate lessons, quizzes, and structure from videos, PDFs, or articles. No editing, no setup just upload and launch. It also includes a built-in website, payments, certificates, and analytics, so you can create, sell, and grow from one place. Built for creators who want to turn content into income without dealing with complex tools.

launches.name: GymApp
launches.tagline: Run a smarter gym. Grow on autopilot.
launches.description: GymApp is a modern fitness & gym management platform with memberships, class scheduling, QR check-in, automated billing, analytics, and a branded member portal, all in one app. Features: Member profiles, digital waivers, Stripe billing, workout tracking, 4-tier access control (Admin, Owner, Coach, Member), and multi-tenant architecture for boutique studios to multi-location franchises. 14-day free trial · No credit card required

launches.name: Ovesio
launches.tagline: Forecast Revenue & Demands + Optimize Stock & Prices With AI
launches.description: Maximize profits with Ovesio: AI sales forecasting, inventory optimization, and multilingual AI content to scale your eCommerce globally.

launches.name: Warder
launches.tagline: Accessibility monitoring for teams that ship every week
launches.description: Warder is continuous WCAG 2.1 monitoring for real websites. It runs axe-core, tracks issues in projects with full history, and offers exports and read-only share links. Starter and Pro add scheduled daily/weekly scans and email; Pro adds Slack, webhooks, a REST API, and 365-day history. One-off audits miss regressions; we built this so teams can prove the live site stayed accessible. Optional Lighthouse (when enabled) adds performance context.

launches.name: Linkly
launches.tagline: Campaign link management built for agencies
launches.description: Agencies still manage links in Bitly, track UTMs in spreadsheets, and scramble when clients ask how campaigns performed. Linkly keeps links, UTMs, and reporting in one place.

launches.name: Locus Intelligence
launches.tagline: Dealer Network Governance Platform
launches.description: Locus Intelligence is an enterprise location intelligence and governance platform for multi-location brands in India. Built for dealer and franchise networks, it detects operational risk across locations, triggers accountability, tracks resolution, and surfaces benchmarks before performance drops hit revenue. It also includes location microsites, local SEO controls, AI bots, task workflows, and API/webhook integrations.

launches.name: CheckView
launches.tagline: The first automated testing platform built for WordPress.
launches.description: Automatically detect when WordPress forms, WooCommerce checkout and more break after website updates or changes are made. Get alerted immediately and receive helpful tips to resolve any issues before it impacts real users.

launches.name: Unstatus
launches.tagline: Know the moment your services go down
launches.description: Unstatus is an open-source status page and uptime monitoring platform. Where you can have monitors for all kind of stuff. Databases, tcp, websites etc. Free and open-source. Though the cloud version is recommend, comes with a really good free tier.
